description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle, operating in manual mode, was traveling north on Folsom Street, preparing to turn left onto 21st Street in San Francisco 
when the front wheel on the driver's side rode over a traffic island to the left side of the Zoox vehicle. The sidewall of the tire was damaged 
as a result of the interaction. There were no reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
